headline: NextEra Energy (NEE) Price Target Raised by $1 at Barclays
summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is included among the 15 Best Nuclear Power Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. With a market cap of almost $180 billion as of the writing of this article, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is the most valuable utility company in the world. The company boasts a diverse mix of […]
